prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

you need to do ALL of these, each one gets its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

the copy should be compelling, on-brand, and like actually production ready

use all your tools to get this done. do everything, don't skip anything. i want to see every single file written. make sure it's thorough and complete

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Lumina — light that adapts to how you work.

Headline: Your workspace, lit perfectly—automatically.

Meet Lumina, the smart desk lamp that syncs with your day. It adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, your calendar, and the lighting in your room—so your eyes stay comfortable and your focus stays sharp.

Morning meetings get crisp, energizing light. Late-night deep work gets warm, calming glow. Lumina makes every hour feel like the right hour, without a single tap.

Designed for remote workers who want less hassle and more momentum, Lumina brings wellness and productivity to your desk for $149.

Email 1: Launch Announcement
Subject: Introducing Lumina — a smarter light for your workday

Hi [First Name],

Your workday changes by the hour—your lighting should too. Meet Lumina, the smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on the time of day, your calendar, and your room’s ambient light.

From energizing mornings to mellow evenings, Lumina keeps your workspace comfortable without you lifting a finger. No more squinting at a screen, no more manual tweaks.

Launch price is $149. If you’re ready for a desk that feels better all day long, Lumina is here.

→ Discover Lumina

Warmly,
The Lumina Team

---
Email 2: Benefits + Social Proof
Subject: What happens when your lamp “just works”

Hi [First Name],

We built Lumina for the realities of remote work—back-to-back calls, focus sprints, and late-night deadlines. It quietly adapts to your schedule and environment so your eyes don’t have to.

What you’ll feel:
• Less eye strain with automatic, glare-free adjustments
• Better focus with light that matches your energy level
• A calmer, more comfortable space without constant tinkering

Remote workers told us Lumina “makes the day feel smoother” and “instantly upgraded the desk.”

Ready to see the difference? Lumina is available now for $149.

→ Shop Lumina

The Lumina Team

---
Email 3: Last Chance / Nudge
Subject: Last chance to upgrade your desk with Lumina

Hi [First Name],

If you’ve been thinking about a better lighting setup for your home office, this is your sign. Lumina adjusts to your day automatically—no app juggling, no manual dimming.

Set it once and enjoy light that’s always right: for video calls, deep work, or winding down.

Lumina is $149 and ready to ship.

→ Get Lumina now

Thanks for being part of the Lumina community,
The Lumina Team

Twitter/X (2 posts)
1) Your desk light shouldn’t need babysitting. Lumina adapts to time of day, your calendar, and ambient light—so your space feels right all day. $149. #remotework #productivity
2) Morning focus. Evening calm. One lamp. Lumina’s smart lighting adjusts automatically to keep eyes comfy and work flowing. Available now for $149.

Instagram (2 posts)
1) Meet Lumina ✨ The smart desk lamp that tunes brightness + color temp based on your day and your room. Less strain, more focus. $149. #workfromhome #desksetup
2) Lights that match your schedule. Lumina syncs with your calendar and ambient light for a workspace that feels good, hour by hour. Tap to shop.

LinkedIn (2 posts)
1) Remote work deserves better lighting. Lumina is a smart desk lamp that adjusts to time of day, calendar events, and room lighting to reduce eye strain and support focus. Now available for $149.
2) The best productivity upgrade isn’t another app—it’s your environment. Lumina’s adaptive lighting keeps your workspace comfortable automatically, from morning standups to late-night deep work.

HERO
Headline: Light that adapts to your workday.
Subheadline: Lumina is a smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient room light.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

WHY LUMINA
Your schedule changes constantly. Your lighting shouldn’t be stuck on one setting. Lumina quietly optimizes your workspace so your eyes feel better and your focus lasts longer.

FEATURES
1) Automatic daily rhythm
- Cool, energizing light in the morning
- Warm, calming light in the evening

2) Calendar-aware lighting
- Brighter during meetings and calls
- Softer during deep work and wind-down

3) Ambient light sensing
- Adjusts when sunlight changes
- Keeps your desk consistent and comfortable

4) No-fuss setup
- Plug in, connect once, and forget it
- Works in the background so you don’t have to

5) Designed for remote work
- Reduces eye strain
- Helps maintain focus and comfort

TESTIMONIALS (Placeholder)
“Lumina made my workdays feel smoother and less tiring.” — [Name], Remote Designer
“The light is always right. I stopped thinking about it after day one.” — [Name], Product Manager
“A small upgrade that made a big difference.” — [Name], Engineer

FAQ
1) How does Lumina adjust lighting automatically?
Lumina uses time-of-day scheduling, your calendar events, and an ambient light sensor to choose the best brightness and color temperature.

2) Do I need an app to use Lumina?
Only for initial setup. After that, Lumina runs automatically.

3) Will it work in different rooms or lighting conditions?
Yes. The ambient sensor adapts to bright or dim rooms and changing daylight.

4) Can I override the settings manually?
Yes. You can adjust or set a manual mode anytime.

5) Is Lumina good for video calls?
Absolutely. It brightens and balances light during meetings for a more natural look.

6) What’s the price and what’s included?
Lumina is $149 and includes the lamp, power adapter, and quick-start guide.

CTA
Ready for lighting that just works?
Get Lumina for $149
Free shipping. 30-day returns.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Headline: Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Automatically Adapts to the Workday

Dateline: SAN FRANCISCO, CA — [Month Day, Year]

Lumina today announced the launch of its smart desk lamp designed specifically for remote workers. The $149 Lumina lamp automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting to help reduce eye strain and improve focus.

Remote work has made home office environments a critical part of productivity and wellness. Lumina brings an “it just works” experience to lighting, removing the need for constant manual adjustments.

“People shouldn’t have to think about their lighting while they’re trying to get work done,” said [Spokesperson Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We designed Lumina to quietly adapt in the background so your workspace always feels right.”

Key features include:
- Automatic adjustments based on time of day
- Calendar-aware brightness for meetings and focus time
- Ambient light sensing that responds to changing daylight

Lumina is available now for $149 at [website URL].

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart lighting that adapts to how people actually work. With a focus on comfort, simplicity, and modern design, Lumina helps remote workers build healthier, more productive spaces.

Media Contact:
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]
[Website]
